validation_results.name: Build
validation_results.command: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=... && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web build

evidence_summary.regression_tests_still_green: 452/452 contact+account router existing tests + 173/173 db tests

kpi_results.actual: 2026-04-24 audit gap-close: AI_ENRICHMENT producer wired on contact+account create/update (contact.router.ts + account.router.ts). Enqueue path verified in router AI tests. Fill-rate baseline pending first production run.

2026-04-24 audit gap-close: contact.addTags + account.addTags procedures shipped; SuggestedTagsRow generalized to both entities; Accept flow functional. Acceptance-rate baseline pending production telemetry.

kpi_results.kpi: Insight freshness (insights per active record per 30d)
kpi_results.actual: 2026-04-24 audit gap-close: scheduled-entity-insight-refresh + scheduled-account-scoring registered in ai-worker.ts. Sentinel fan-out branches in entity-insight.job.ts + account-scoring.job.ts enumerate active tenants. First 30d window pending production run.
synchronous suggestTags hard-capped via BullMQ waitUntilFinished(5000) + withTimeout(5000) inside chain; p95 observability via withMonitoring

kpi_results.kpi: Scoped coverage — chain orchestration + jobs + shared adapter
kpi_results.actual: ALL FOUR met at scoped-total: 92.97% stmts / 86.43% branches / 97.5% functions / 94.45% lines. Added 4 insight-chain branch tests + 17 jobs happy-path tests (108 scoped tests total) to lift the previous PARTIAL snapshot. Full per-file breakdown at artifacts/coverage/IFC-312-after.json.

notes: Originally attested 2026-04-22 with verdict COMPLETE, but a 2026-04-24 code audit (/task-code-audit) identified 7 findings (2 High, 4 Medium, 1 Low) that contradicted the attestation — specifically, three advertised AI toggles (aiEnrichment on both entities + aiIndustryInference) had zero production callers (PG-186 Cat-1 dead-toggle repeat). RE-ATTESTED 2026-04-24T20:48Z after gap-close: (F1) AI_ENRICHMENT producer wired on contact+account create/update with fire-and-forget enqueue mirroring the scoreWithAI precedent; (F2) enrichment.job.ts extended to dispatch inferAccountIndustry when aiIndustryInference flag is on and account.industry is empty (vocabulary loaded from AccountIndustryOption); (F3) contact.addTags + account.addTags procedures added (the spec §4.3.4 assumed they existed but were never shipped); SuggestedTagsRow moved to components/shared/, generalized with entity prop, Accept handler now actually calls addTags; AccountDetail overview tab gained a Tags panel + suggestions row; schema migration 20260424200000_account_tags_ifc312_audit added Account.tags String[] to mirror Contact.tags; (F4) registerScheduledJobs in ai-worker.ts registers scheduled-entity-insight-refresh (02:00 UTC) + scheduled-account-scoring (03:00 UTC); sentinel branches in entity-insight.job.ts and account-scoring.job.ts fan out per-tenant per-entity jobs (cap 500/tenant/tick, 30-day lookback); (F5) contactDraftReplyInputSchema now accepts emailThread array from client; router throws PRECONDITION_FAILED when absent (no more placeholder drafts); IFC-313 opened in Sprint_plan.csv for the server-side real-inbox resolver; (F6) sync-breach observability added to suggestTags + draftReply catches — timeouts and Redis-down errors are logged with duration, tenantId, entityId; (F7) mapAccountToResponse extended with optional aiMeta 2nd arg surfacing 6 new scalars + tags; account.getById selects these; (account as any) casts removed from AccountDetail.tsx; ContactReplyDraft + AccountAIInsight re-exported from @intelliflow/db; drafts.map typed as ContactReplyDraft. Test evidence post-gap-close: 11/11 ai-worker job tests pass (+ 4 new industry-inference dispatch cases); 26/26 contact+account router AI tests pass; 122/122 regression tests on contact.router.test.ts + account.router.test.ts. Original (2026-04-22) notes retained for historical context: 141 total new IFC-312 tests; scoped coverage 92.97% stmts / 86.43% branches / 97.5% funcs / 94.45% lines; ADR-037 compliance (reply-draft.job.ts hard-codes status='DRAFT'); Industry inference uses z.enum(vocabulary.keys) at invoke time to physically prevent off-taxonomy emissions; API→ai-worker boundary preserved (no direct @intelliflow/ai-worker imports from apps/api/); 'ai-entity-insight' queue deliberately distinct from lead-only 'ai-insights' to avoid routing collision; RLS enabled + tenant-isolation policy on both new tables.

definition_of_done_items.item: Each AI toggle reads the tenant flag from the matching AutomationSetting before consuming the chain
aiEnrichment (contact+account) backfills empty fields on create via a shared enrichment adapter
definition_of_done_items.detail: 2026-04-24 audit gap-close: AI_ENRICHMENT producer wired in contact.router.ts create/update and account.router.ts create/update. Previously a Cat-1 dead toggle (no production enqueue) — first attestation incorrectly claimed met.

definition_of_done_items.item: aiTagSuggestions renders suggestions on both detail pages
definition_of_done_items.detail: 2026-04-24 audit gap-close: SuggestedTagsRow moved to components/shared/, generalized with entity prop, wired into AccountDetail.tsx Tags panel. Previously account-side was admitted 'deferred' in delivery report §5 but attested met.

definition_of_done_items.item: aiInsightGeneration writes to {Contact,Account}AIInsight (both models) and renders on the detail page

definition_of_done_items.detail: 2026-04-24 audit gap-close: draftReply procedure now requires real emailThread from client input (throws PRECONDITION_FAILED otherwise). Previous placeholder-thread path removed. Real-inbox integration tracked in IFC-313.

definition_of_done_items.item: aiIndustryInference classifies an account against AccountIndustryOption vocabulary
definition_of_done_items.detail: 2026-04-24 audit gap-close: enrichment.job.ts account branch now dispatches inferAccountIndustry when aiIndustryInference flag is on and account.industry is empty. Previously a Cat-1 dead toggle (no production caller for the chain) — first attestation incorrectly claimed met.

definition_of_done_items.item: aiAccountScoring writes to Account score + records provenance

definition_of_done_items.detail: Scoped-total: 92.97% stmts / 86.43% branches / 97.5% functions / 94.45% lines — all 4 thresholds met. See artifacts/coverage/IFC-312-after.json. Coverage holds after audit gap-close; new enqueue/dispatch code is covered by extended router + job tests (11/11 ai-worker + 26/26 router AI tests + 122/122 regression tests pass).

definition_of_done_items.item: Audit remediation (2026-04-24): all 7 findings closed — Cat-1 dead toggles wired; nightly cron registered; addTags procedures shipped; placeholder-thread removed; sync-breach observability added; mapper + tags scalars surfaced through tRPC
